name: Hardware Compatibility Test | openEuler
description: Test your hardware's compatibility with openEuler and get ready for seamless integration.

name: openEuler Hardware Compatibility Test Process
description: Step-by-step process to test your hardware's compatibility with openEuler and get certified.

step.name: Apply to join the openEuler community
step.text: Apply to join the openEuler community. Estimated time: 0.5 days.

step.name: Apply for a compatibility test
step.text: Apply for a compatibility test. Estimated time: 0.5 days.

step.name: Understand the compatibility policies
step.text: Understand the compatibility policies. Estimated time: 0.5 days.

step.name: Create an issue
step.text: Create an issue in the openEuler repository. Estimated time: 0.5 days.

step.name: Perform the compatibility test
step.text: Perform the compatibility test on your hardware. Estimated time: 10 days.

step.name: Submit results for review
step.text: Submit the test results for review. Estimated time: 2 days.

step.name: Get published in compatibility list
step.text: After approval, your hardware will be listed in the openEuler compatibility list. Estimated time: 2 days.
